a unified file-storage SDK abstracting 30+ storage backends (S3, R2, GCS, Azure, Dropbox, Google Drive, etc.) behind one API, with plugins (encryption, dedup, versioning, soft-delete, zip), React/Vue/Svelte hooks, AI-SDK/OpenAI/Claude tool bindings, and a CLI with MCP server mode

zero-config linter/formatter preset CLI that wires Biome, ESLint, or oxlint with framework-aware rule sets (React, Next, Vue, Svelte, Angular, etc.), git hooks, and editor configs, plus an AI-agent skill/SKILL.md and CLAUDE.md guidance for coding agents to follow its lint rules directly

single-binary MCP server exposing schema-discovery, read/write-query, DDL, and explain-query tools over MySQL/MariaDB/Postgres/SQLite, with a read-only mode and a built-in PII detection/redaction/anonymization crate covering many country-specific identifiers

a native micro-UI library that opens a lightweight WebView window (no Electron) controlled via JSON-lines over stdin/stdout, with floating/frameless/transparent/click-through modes and cursor-following support across macOS/Linux/Windows

a protocol and library letting a small on-device model and a frontier cloud model collaborate on a task, keeping long-context reading local to cut cloud token costs while preserving answer quality; includes secure encrypted remote-execution mode

a C++/CUDA tile-primitive DSL for writing high-performance GPU kernels (attention, GEMM, linear attention, collective ops), including a working FlashAttention-3 implementation and multi-GPU networking primitives

Terminal-based autonomous coding agent (Rust/ratatui TUI) with file read/write/search tools, web search/fetch, a persistent knowledge-graph memory system, and multi-provider LLM support (OpenRouter/LMStudio/OpenAI).
platform for running fleets of AI agents as durable, sandboxed production services with pluggable backends (Docker/E2B/Daytona/host), approval gates, and channel integrations (Slack/Discord/Telegram)

macOS security daemon that monitors AI agent activity (file access, clipboard, messages, email) for prompt injection, sensitive data leaks, and unauthorized actions, with an encrypted vault for sensitive files and a Rust-based 7-layer intent analysis engine exposed via FFI.
worked example scripts (cart checkout, counterfeit detection, structured extraction) driving H Company's computer-use agent SDK against real websites
official Python SDK and CLI for H Company's hosted computer-use agent API: create agents, manage sessions, browser profiles, poll for completion
official TypeScript SDK for H Company's hosted computer-use agent API, mirroring the Python SDK's agents/sessions/browser-profile resources

a small (~1450 line) terminal coding-agent CLI that routes to 100+ LLM providers via litellm, with a real tool-calling loop (bash/read/write/edit/glob/grep), parallel tool execution, context compression, and session save/resume

a CLI that fires the same coding task at multiple installed agent CLIs (Claude Code, aider, Codex, Gemini) in parallel git worktrees, then ranks them by test pass-rate, cost, diff size, and time, producing patches and an HTML report

a from-scratch, deliberately minimal coding-agent implementing the core loop (LLM+tools, tool dispatch, context management, subagents, session/CLI) in readable Python, paired with essays explaining each piece

a CLI that packages a real GitHub issue/bug (base commit, repro command, test command) into a small reusable before/after coding-agent benchmark task, runs it, scores pass/fail, and exports an HTML report or markdown context pack

A CLI that statically analyzes a project's languages/frameworks/linters/CI/tests and generates matching AI-assistant rule files (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, copilot-instructions.md, AGENTS.md, etc.) for nine different coding-agent tools, plus an audit/lint mode to check existing rule files.

Compresses/rewrites tool outputs, logs, RAG chunks, and conversation history before they hit the LLM via a library, CLI-wrap, reverse proxy, or MCP server, using content-specific compressors (JSON, code AST, diffs, logs) plus cache-alignment and a reversible retrieval store (CCR).
A benchmark harness that runs LLM agents against a Dockerized FHIR EHR server on 100 long-horizon clinical tasks (670 checkpoints), scoring outputs via per-task pytest suites and a trajectory viewer.

Rust ReAct-loop agent runtime with async tool execution via tokio JoinSet, running real terminal-bench-2 benchmark suites and shipping as installable binaries/crates.
Rust CLI/library computing posterior probabilities (base-pairing, nucleotide matching, structural context profiles) on RNA pairwise structural alignments via an inside-outside algorithm.

A Rust command-line tool computing posterior probabilities on RNA pairwise structural alignment using a machine-learning-trained scoring model (ConsProb-trained), benchmarked against classical alignment tools.
a Playwright-driven browser agent that injects transient DOM identifiers, loops perception-reasoning-action via GPT-4o, and can fall back to coordinate clicks for canvas apps like Excalidraw
CLI/web research agent that runs a typed tool loop (search_web, read_url, list_sources, save_report) against Moonshot Kimi and streams run events to a React console

a fully local, browser-based AI dungeon RPG: a FastAPI orchestrator runs an LLM narrator plus per-character agents (one shared local model, Gemma MoE via llama.cpp/Vulkan) that advance an explicit SQLite state machine only through validated tools, with background local image generation (FLUX.2/ComfyUI) and per-character TTS voice synthesis (Maya1)

A local-first ops console combining a model gateway (OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible routing), a chat workspace, a queued task runtime with tool-calling agent loop, and a supervisor for external coding-agent CLIs (ACP sessions) with approvals, sandboxing, and OpenTelemetry tracing.
desktop GUI chat app that manages local GGUF model files (via Hugging Face) and runs them through llama.cpp for offline conversational chat
Self-hosted Amazon-seller operations workbench bundling Listing image generation, market research, ad analytics, a knowledge base, and a built-in chat agent (IvyeaAgent) behind one local server.

An on-device LLM inference engine (Rust) for ARM64/Adreno-GPU edge devices with NEON/OpenCL/CUDA backends, zero-copy UMA memory, a runtime-loadable KV-cache eviction/precision plugin system (StreamingLLM, H2O, D2O, KIVI), and an OpenAI-compatible multi-turn chat server.

Standalone Rust service that monitors CPU/GPU/memory/thermal/power and drives a Lua-scriptable policy engine to send runtime commands (evict KV cache, throttle, switch backend) to a companion on-device LLM inference engine over Unix socket/TCP/D-Bus.

Shared Rust types (serde-serializable enums/structs) defining the IPC wire protocol between a resource-manager process and an on-device LLM inference engine process (Argus): system signals (memory/thermal/energy/compute pressure) and engine commands (throttle, swap/recall weights, KV eviction).

A LangGraph-based multi-agent system that clones a target crypto library (openHiTLS), builds a BM25 + dependency-graph code index, then runs planning and coding subagents plus an automated compilation sandbox to generate cryptographic algorithm implementations.

cross-platform (desktop+Android) Tauri app that imports TXT novels, chunks them per paragraph/chapter to fit LLM context limits, and uses an LLM to detect typos/formatting/awkward sentences with one-click fixes, plus character/relationship-graph extraction, script conversion, and emotional TTS narration.
library + local playground for running the same prompts across multiple LLMs/vector DBs and scoring/comparing results via code, notebooks or a Streamlit UI

forces an LLM-extracted causal graph through a Rust engine that rejects cycles (Kahn's algorithm) and extracts d-separation conditional-independence assertions, feeding contradictions back to the LLM in a bounded self-repair loop
macOS menu-bar app: hold-to-speak voice transcription with per-app/URL prompt rules that feeds Whisper/LLM enhancement, translation, and voice-to-prompt text insertion into the focused input.

Chrome extension (Manifest V3) that lets a developer Alt-click any DOM element to view/edit its underlying JSON schema live via a CodeMirror drawer, with recording/diff, favorites, and an SDK for host pages (integrates with the Agentic UI Bubble component).

Pre-indexes a repo via tree-sitter structural analysis (call graphs, symbols, imports) and injects query-aware context budgets via hooks into Claude Code, Codex, and Copilot so agents skip exploratory grepping.
multilingual curated directory/awesome-list of third-party Agent Skills (SKILL.md files) across vendors, plus a Next.js website (agent-skill.co) presenting the same list with search/browse UI

A WeChat bot bridge that routes incoming WeChat text messages to any of several ACP-mode coding agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini, Qwen, Cursor, Kimi), maintaining per-user default agent, working directory, and session nonce, serialized through a per-user queue.

A Claude Code plugin that turns an idea into a DDD-modeled backlog of bounded contexts (via strategic/tactical-modeler agents), then executes tasks through parallel dependency-aware workers with TDD discipline and a fresh-context verifier gate before commit, tracked on a Kanban dashboard with ADRs and a protocol log.

A configurable deep-research agent (LangGraph-based, multi-model, MCP-compatible search) forked to add Zhipu GLM-4.5/GLM-4.5-Air support via custom endpoint routing and structured-output fallback handling

Unofficial Python client (sync/async) for Perplexity.ai's web interface, with automated throwaway-account generation to get unlimited pro queries, plus an MCP server exposing the same search as Claude Code tools.

A Scheme-like Lisp compiled to a bytecode VM, shipped as a single binary, with LLM calls (complete/extract/classify/chat/embed/rerank), agent definitions with tool-calling and budget caps, and provider fallback/caching/cassette-replay built into the language runtime.
LLM observability platform and AI gateway: proxies/logs calls across 100+ models with one API key, tracing/sessions for agents, cost/latency analytics, prompt versioning, fine-tuning export

Eight short runnable Python recipes (Discord tool-bot, async job pipeline, scraper+classifier, file-bus multi-agent builder/reviewer loop, SQLite-memory agent, PDF Q&A, voice bot, multi-pass executor) built against MiniMax M3's Anthropic-compatible API.
A thin Python wrapper around the OpenAI SDK pointed at MiniMax M3's Anthropic-compatible endpoint, providing sync/async chat, vision, transcription, TTS, streaming and auto-retry on 429/5xx.

Claude Code/Codex/Cursor plugin that routes tasks through a staged pipeline (design->dev->e2e->review->qa->refactor->handoff) with isolated fresh-context subagents per phase, disk-persisted run state, a stop-gate hook blocking session exit mid-workflow, adversarial peer-challenge rounds on plans, and a hierarchical evidence requirement (screenshot/log > HTTP 200 > "should work") before a phase can pass.

A durable workflow engine for LLM agent graphs: typed nodes (LLM, tool, superagent, subgraph, conditional, foreach), MCP client integration, multi-provider (Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/Bedrock) codecs, worker queue execution, and a Terraform provider for deploying graphs as infrastructure.

Ed25519-signed, RFC8785-canonicalized delegation-token protocol and per-framework middleware (CrewAI, LangChain, AutoGen, MCP, Grok, physical-robotics guardrails) that builds a tamper-evident, fully offline-verifiable chain from an authorizing human through every downstream agent hop.

A graph+vector database written in Rust with a query DSL compiled to a JSON AST, a CLI (helix init/start/query) that runs local instances, and SDKs in 4 languages; ships a 'helix chef' bootstrapper that can hand off to a coding agent.

Go module that spawns and manages multiple headless CLI coding agents (OpenCode, Claude Code, Gemini, Junie, Qwen Code) as subprocesses, communicating via a hybrid pipe+file transport with pluggable i18n for user-facing strings.

Self-hosted platform that runs AI agents on private GPU infrastructure with desktop sandboxes per agent, RAG knowledge bases, skills/tool calling, multi-tenant orgs, Slack/GitHub integrations, and a model-agnostic inference router (OpenAI, Anthropic, local models).

a code+document intelligence server that clones/indexes git repos and documents (PDF/Office), then serves BM25/semantic/visual/grep search plus LLM-generated architecture docs, API docs, DB schema, cookbook examples, and wiki pages via MCP and REST

Self-hosted LLM inference proxy/router/gateway with API-key management, cost tracking, rate limiting, smart routing across providers, and an experimental E2E-encrypted p2p mesh to pool inference capacity across nodes.

MCP server that lets Claude Code delegate bulk/cheap work (extraction, embeddings, rerank, long grinding coding tasks) to a pool of local or remote OpenAI-compatible model backends, with warm-session pinning, capability-aware routing, and runaway-task aborts.
Go MCP server wrapping the dufs file-server HTTP API into MCP tools (upload/download/delete/list/move/hash) with async batch-upload job tracking, over stdio or HTTP/SSE transport.

Desktop workbench for computational materials science: 3D structure editor/viewer, natural-language agent (CatBot) that drives DFT codes (VASP, ORCA, CP2K, etc.), visual DAG workflow engine, and HPC job submission/monitoring over SSH.
A Go CLI/HTTP-server/desktop (Wails) chat client with pluggable LLM providers, personas/styles, memory, and subagent support, sharing one web UI across all surfaces.
MCP server that ingests a resume, generates tailored interview questions, records/transcribes interview audio via on-device ASR, and produces an evaluation report inside an IDE

A Codex Skill (SKILL.md + reference docs + prompt templates) that guides an AI agent to generate a consistent hand-drawn 16:9 illustration style for Chinese-language articles, keyed to a specific mascot character.

A Go control-plane service that hot-swaps between multiple self-hosted vLLM model containers using vLLM's sleep-mode API, proxying OpenAI-compatible requests to whichever model is currently active, with a full Prometheus/Grafana/Loki/DCGM observability stack.

Deploys and manages teams of Claude Code CLI agents as Docker/Kubernetes containers, each paired with a Go sidecar that bridges NATS JetStream messaging to the agent process, exposed via a REST API for team lifecycle and chat routing.

self-hosted gateway that converts REST/SOAP/GraphQL/SQL APIs and other MCP servers into MCP tools via a visual editor or spec import, plus a per-workspace knowledge graph inferring how connectors' data relates

semantic codebase search/index built on tree-sitter parsing and usearch vector index, exposed as MCP tools (codebase_search, call graph, PR impact) with git-branch-aware incremental updates
Checkers-playing program using Minimax search with alpha-beta pruning and hand-written heuristics, run in a notebook

language-agnostic sidecar service (HTTP API) that any AI agent calls before executing an action, enforcing per-user budget caps, rule-based allow/deny policies, token-bucket rate limits, and persisted structured audit logs

logs deep-learning experiment configs, metrics, and training-step data to Postgres and serves a Vue/Highcharts web dashboard to browse them
Python client that reverse-engineers Perplexity's web UI (session-token auth) to run conversations, exposed as a library, CLI, MCP server, and an OpenAI-compatible REST API proxy.

MCP server letting Claude Code/Codex delegate bounded text-generation calls to local models (LM Studio/Ollama/vLLM/llama.cpp) or cheap cloud APIs, gated by a RAM-usage safety valve and text-only sandbox

Go CLI that orchestrates a planner/implementer/reviewer/learner loop across isolated git worktrees, driving other CLI agents (claude, codex) inside a fixed tmux dashboard, with repo-local memory of past run lessons.
Self-hosted CI agent that connects to the Hercules CI SaaS to evaluate and build Nix flakes/expressions, run declarative effects (deploys, secrets), and cache results.

a GitHub-native CLI (`herd plan`) that decomposes a feature request into a task DAG, dispatches multiple coding-agent workers (Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Cursor) in parallel on self-hosted runners tier-by-tier, consolidates results via an integrator, runs automated review with fix cycles, and opens one reviewed PR

Telegram-controlled personal agent daemon in Go: ReAct loop with cron scheduling, file-based tiered memory (MEMORY.md/daily logs/entity files), workspace tool registry, and pluggable LLM/transcription providers (OpenAI/OpenRouter/Ollama, Whisper).

an MCP server exposing 13 tools that let AI coding agents operate, couple, and extend 8 independent finite-element solvers (FEniCSx, deal.II, Kratos, etc.) with cross-backend pitfall knowledge and postmortem-based learning
CLI/library implementing Hindley-Milner-style unification over hand-written type/variable/function constraints, with a REPL for loading and solving constraint files.

Rust agent framework enforcing capability-token-gated tool execution, compile-time tainted/clean data typing, AES-256-GCM encrypted local memory store, BLAKE3 hash-chained audit log, and mandatory Wasm-sandboxed plugins.

An awesome-list of curated real-world use cases (markdown writeups) for the OpenClaw AI-companion/automation agent, community-contributed.

Local dashboard/orchestrator that manages many Claude Code terminal sessions as scoped 'tentacles' (per-job context+todo.md files), letting one parent Claude Code agent spawn and message child Claude Code agents and track their state visually.

A large library of ComfyUI nodes that let users wire LLM calls, tool use (web, social APIs, RAG/GraphRAG, TTS/OCR), and multi-agent interaction patterns into visual node-graph workflows alongside image-generation pipelines.

A self-hosted desktop/server AI companion app that combines an LLM chat backend, VRM avatar/vtuber rendering, Discord/IM bot channels, MCP tool support, and home-assistant integration into one runtime.

Self-hosted personal AI workbench built on Claude Agent SDK: reuses existing Claude/Codex subscription auth, gives the agent persistent file-based personal context (health, finance, notes), renders HTML/Markdown live, syncs across desktop/mobile PWA, and supports scheduled tasks and multi-provider model switching.

browser-based visual spec editor with an architecture canvas (nodes/edges, 6 diagram types) that exports specs as CLAUDE.md/Mermaid/JSON/XML and can push directly to GitHub or open a Claude Code/Claude.ai session

Curated, auto-validated directory of Claude Code ecosystem resources (skills, hooks, slash-commands, orchestrators, CLAUDE.md examples, statuslines) with a submission pipeline, health-checking bot, and multiple auto-generated README layouts.
a handful of Claude Code output-style persona files (pirate/tabloid/zen-master etc.) that override the default system prompt tone
archived set of Claude Code slash commands (create-prd, create-jtbd, implement-code, review-code) and their PRD/JTBD markdown templates, rescued from an upstream repo that removed them

A LangGraph-orchestrated pipeline of 8 agents (survey design, persona modeling, data-expansion/simulation, sentiment/topic analysis via sklearn, plotting, report writing) that generates a full simulated market-research paper — survey, 2000 rows of fabricated respondent data, charts, and a Markdown academic report — from a topic string.

A CometBFT-based blockchain where AI agent validators (via Eliza or similar frameworks) propose, debate, and vote on governance proposals under a Genesis Contract, with on-chain storage of the proposal/vote history.

A dotnet CLI (`hx`) and spec-driven workflow that scaffolds a compiling .NET 10 solution and enforces a fail-closed agent cycle (specify→clarify→plan→arch-review→tasks→analyze→implement→drift-review→release) via command-checked gate proofs, task hashes, and ArchUnitNET architecture tests.

Multi-platform AI agent framework (Telegram/Discord/Twitter/Farcaster/REST/MCP) bundled with 'Heurist Mesh', a marketplace of 30+ specialized Web3/crypto data agents (on-chain analytics, token info, wallet forensics) callable via API, x402 pay-per-use, or MCP.

A monorepo of Excel/PowerPoint/Word Office Add-ins that embed a BYOK LLM chat panel with tools to read/write documents via Office.js, a sandboxed shell, and a virtual filesystem; includes a local bridge server/CLI for inspecting and driving a live add-in runtime.

Web app for elderly users to record spoken life stories, which are transcribed (FunASR), structured into chapters/people/migrations, and polished into first-person memoir text with a family timeline/map

Claude Code plugin that fans a query out to multiple AI coding CLIs/APIs (Codex, Gemini/Antigravity, Grok, Perplexity) in parallel, streams results side-by-side in a tmux pane, synthesizes a combined answer, and optionally runs an async background job queue or a pre-stop diff-review gate.
A workflow/automation runtime (v3, monorepo with a YAML-DSL 'agentic' workflow engine) that runs LLM-backed agents, actions, and conversational channels (chat widgets, messaging platforms) together.

Go AI-agent framework providing ReAct/Plan-Execute/Reflection/Tree-of-Thought reasoning strategies, a Pregel-style graph orchestration engine with checkpoints/time-travel/interrupts, multi-agent teams/handoff/A2A protocol, RAG engine, and a companion ai-core/toolkit ecosystem of separate repos.

Production-grade MCP server exposing 77 tools over Pi-hole v6's REST API for DNS blocklist/domain/DHCP/network management, with multi-instance aggregation, a dry-run diff/sync workflow (confirm-token + pre-sync backup), and rate-limiting/origin-allowlisting for HTTP/SSE transports.
runs a full in-memory PostgreSQL server inside WebAssembly (via v86 x86 emulation) usable from Node.js or browser for unit/E2E tests, with a node-postgres compatible config

82M-parameter text-to-speech inference pipeline (KPipeline/KModel) supporting multiple languages/voices with phoneme-level pronunciation control, plus a JS/browser port (kokoro.js) with its own voice packs

A single reusable system prompt (installed into AGENTS.md via install.sh) that rewrites verbose LLM chatbot output into terser, more direct responses, with a benchmark script measuring character-count reduction against GPT models.

A pluggable Java framework (dat-sdk/dat-cli) that lets developers define a semantic data model (entities/dimensions/measures in YAML) over a database, then answers natural-language questions by generating dialect-correct SQL through an LLM agent, exposed via CLI, OpenAPI, or MCP server.
a Dockerized personalized-learning webapp: FastAPI/LangGraph backend generates learning resources and paths via LLM chat, Vue3 frontend, FAISS-backed RAG over student profile/learning-record data

multi-agent Chinese mutual-fund analysis system: parallel analyst agents (fundamentals/technical/industry/manager/sentiment/news) feed a 3-round bull/bear debate, then trader→risk-manager→portfolio-advisor agents produce evidence-tiered (FACT/ESTIMATE/INFERENCE) recommendations via a Spring AI Alibaba Graph DAG, with scheduled reports pushed via email/Bark

A self-improving-agent research framework: a Meta-Agent generates a Target Agent for a benchmark task, the Target Agent attempts it, and a Feedback-Agent iterates on both the agent's harness code and (optionally) model weights across generations, with a live web dashboard visualizing runs.

An OpenAPI-spec-to-code generator producing TypeScript and Python SDKs/clients (with 20+ plugins for Zod, TanStack Query, Pydantic, various HTTP clients) plus a codegen-core planning/rendering engine reusable across languages.
